MOTION For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer L. Alesio, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Paul Dodge & Marjorie Dodge

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS PAUL DODGE & MARJORIE DODGE'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 275555 and 275836 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers shall be filed under the lead case no. 275555. One order for both cases was signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported = (503/TLJ)
